mitigations.mitigation_name: Remove execute permission from attacker-usable discovery/exfiltration tools on UbuntuComputer (for example dig, hping3, nmap, curl, nc, socat) while preserving ping and wget

args.command: ls -l /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/hping3 /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/socat /bin/dig /bin/hping3 /bin/nmap /bin/curl /bin/nc /bin/socat 2>/dev/null; chmod a-x /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/hping3 /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/socat /bin/dig /bin/hping3 /bin/nmap /bin/curl /bin/nc /bin/socat 2>/dev/null; ls -l /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/hping3 /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/socat /bin/dig /bin/hping3 /bin/nmap /bin/curl /bin/nc /bin/socat 2>/dev/null; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL

find /bin /usr/bin -maxdepth 1 \( -name dig -o -name hping3 -o -name nmap -o -name curl -o -name nc -o -name socat \) -exec chmod a-x {} +; find /bin /usr/bin -maxdepth 1 \( -name dig -o -name hping3 -o -name nmap -o -name curl -o -name nc -o -name socat \) -exec ls -l {} +; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL

command -v dig; ls -l $(command -v dig); chmod a-x $(command -v dig); ls -l $(command -v dig); command -v python3; ls -l /usr/bin/python3; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo HTTP_STATUS:200; else echo HTTP_STATUS:000; fi

chmod 000 /usr/bin/dig; ls -l /usr/bin/dig; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo HTTP_STATUS:200; else echo HTTP_STATUS:000; fi
